mano_cua.result_summary: IME拼音输入在void元素（<textarea>按钮）内时会破坏元素内容：输入'zhong'导致<textarea>变成<textzhongarea>。对比测试：光标在相邻文本节点时输入不会破坏void元素。根因是编辑器未拦截void元素上的compositionstart/compositionend事件
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Slate Angular editor fails to intercept IME composition events (compositionstart, compositionupdate, compositionend) when the cursor is positioned on a void element. Instead of properly handling the input by redirecting it to an adjacent text node or blocking it, the raw composition text is allowed to be inserted into the DOM node that renders the void element's label/content, causing corruption.
